welcome.title: Get more done with MiniWork
welcome.subtitle: Your AI workspace for everyday tasks.

steps.title: Pick a folder
steps.desc: Choose any folder on your machine to get started.

steps.title: Chat
steps.desc: Describe what you need. MiniWork handles the rest.

steps.title: Interact
steps.desc: Review results, approve actions, and iterate.

features.title: Edit spreadsheets
features.desc: Create, clean, and transform CSV and Excel files.

features.title: Control your browser
features.desc: Automate the built-in browser for repetitive web tasks.

features.title: Organize files
features.desc: Read, write, and manage files and folders.

features.title: Automate tasks
features.desc: Build reusable workflows with skills and commands.

features.title: Connect to APIs
features.desc: Plug into external services and tools via MCP.

zh.title: 用 MiniWork 高效完成工作
zh.subtitle: 你的日常任务 AI 工作台。

steps.title: 选择文件夹
steps.desc: 选择电脑上的任意文件夹即可开始。

steps.title: 对话
steps.desc: 描述你的需求，MiniWork 帮你完成。

steps.title: 确认
steps.desc: 查看结果、批准操作、持续迭代。

features.title: 编辑表格
features.desc: 创建、清理和转换 CSV 与 Excel 文件。

features.title: 操控浏览器
features.desc: 用内置浏览器自动完成重复性网页任务。

features.title: 整理文件
features.desc: 读取、写入和管理文件与文件夹。

features.title: 自动化任务

features.title: 连接 API
